middleware.description: Prevents kiosk spam. Rate-limits check-in POSTs to 5 attempts per athlete per session per minute per source (IP + device fingerprint). Returns 429 ATTENDANCE_RATE_LIMITED with Retry-After header. Uses Redis atomic INCR + TTL for cross-instance coordination. Applied only on POST /api/v1/attendance/check-in and the kiosk-check-in-app route.

For check-in routes with checked_in_via='geofence': validates gps_lat + gps_lng against the session's venue geofence radius. Integrates with the products/geofencing module. Returns 422 ATTENDANCE_GEOFENCE_MISMATCH when outside radius, or ATTENDANCE_GPS_REQUIRED when missing. Skips when checked_in_via != 'geofence' OR when tenant lacks attendance_geofence entitlement (delegates entitlement check to observer).
